fundamentals.title: Fundamentals of Neuroscience
fundamentals.description: The scientific study of the nervous system.

preprocessing.title: Data Preprocessing
preprocessing.description: Transforming raw neural recordings into clean, analyzable data.

steps.title: Import Raw Data
steps.details: Load EEG data into software (e.g., MATLAB, Python with MNE-Python).

steps.title: Remove Bad Channels
steps.details: Identify and remove noisy or faulty electrodes.

steps.title: Filtering
steps.details: Apply high-pass filter (0.5-1 Hz) to remove slow drift, low-pass filter (40-50 Hz) to remove high-frequency noise, and remove power-line noise (50/60 Hz).

steps.title: Re-referencing
steps.details: Convert data to a common reference (e.g., average reference).

steps.title: Artifact Removal
steps.details: Remove artifacts like eye blinks and muscle activity using Independent Component Analysis (ICA).

steps.title: Epoching (Segmentation)
steps.details: Divide continuous EEG into time-locked segments around events (e.g., -1 to 2 sec).

steps.title: Baseline Correction
steps.details: Subtract mean activity of pre-stimulus period from each epoch.

steps.title: Reject Bad Epochs
steps.details: Remove trials with excessive noise or amplitude.

steps.title: Feature Extraction (Optional)
steps.details: Extract useful information like power, frequency bands, or ERD/ERS.

resources.title: Curated Resources
resources.description: A collection of essential tools, libraries, and learning materials.

datasets.title: Public Datasets
datasets.description: Explore a directory of publicly available neuroscience datasets.
